name: libtypes-serialiser-perl
title: libtypes-serialiser-perl
summary: module providing simple data types for common serialisation formats
description:
module providing simple data types for common serialisation formats
Types::Serialiser provides some extra datatypes that are used by common
serialisation formats such as JSON or CBOR. The idea is to have a repository
of simple/small constants and containers that can be shared by different
implementations so they become interoperable between each other.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libtypes-serialiser-perl because module providing simple data types for common serialisation formats.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libtypes-serialiser-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libtypes-serialiser-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libtypes-serialiser-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
